raw_cv_text:
Daniel Miles
daniel.miles@gmail.com · +1 (415) 627-3894 · https://github.com/dmiles-nlp
EDUCATION
Carnegie Mellon University | M.S. in Computer Science (Natural Language Processing) 2015 - 2017
Thesis on contextual word embeddings for domain adaptation awarded department recognition; GPA: 3.92/4.0
University of California, Berkeley | B.S. in Mathematics with Computer Science Minor 2011 - 2015
Completed 6 courses in computational linguistics and statistical NLP; summa cum laude
EXPERIENCE
OpenAI | Senior NLP Engineer March 2022 - Present
Led development of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline that improved answer relevance scores by 34%
across 50M+ daily queries in production systems
Architected and shipped sequence classification module serving 2.8B monthly inference requests with 99.98%
uptime, mentoring team of 4 junior engineers on best practices
Optimized transformer tokenization layer reducing inference latency by 47% and cutting infrastructure costs by
$1.2M annually
Anthropic | Senior Machine Learning Engineer - NLP July 2020 - February 2022
Designed and deployed constitutional AI fine-tuning framework reducing harmful outputs by 72% while maintaining
performance across 15+ benchmark datasets
Established open-source NLP library with 8.2K GitHub stars, enabling 400+ researchers to build safer language
models
Led evaluation infrastructure project processing 500K+ model generations daily, cutting evaluation time by 63%
through novel sampling strategies
Scale AI | Lead NLP Engineer January 2019 - June 2020
Pioneered named entity recognition system for financial documents achieving 96.2% F1 score across 12 entity
types, processing 8M+ documents annually
Managed cross-functional team of 3 engineers delivering semantic search infrastructure processing 15M
queries/month with <200ms p99 latency
Contributed foundational work to open-source spaCy project with 5 merged pull requests improving transformer-
based NER by 8%
Databricks | NLP Engineer August 2017 - December 2018
Developed multilingual sentiment analysis framework supporting 23 languages, reducing annotation costs by 58%
through active learning strategies
Optimized BERT inference on Spark clusters achieving 12x throughput improvement, enabling real-time processing
for 500+ enterprise customers
Implemented distributed question-answering pipeline on 100M document corpus with 89% accuracy, deployed to 3
Fortune 500 companies
PROJECTS
Domain-Adaptive Prompt Tuning Framework | Python, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers, PEFT 2021 - 2022
Created parameter-efficient fine-tuning methodology achieving 91% of full-model performance with 99.8% fewer
trainable parameters on specialized NLP tasks
Published methodology in 3 peer-reviewed venues with 240+ citations, demonstrating practical applications across
biomedical, legal, and clinical domains
Zero-Shot Cross-Lingual Transfer System | Multilingual BERT, mBERT, XLM-R, Kubernetes 2019 - 2020
Engineered zero-shot transfer learning system enabling 7 low-resource languages to leverage English training data
with only 4% performance degradation
Deployed containerized service handling 2M+ monthly inference requests with automatic language detection,
reducing manual labeling costs by $340K annually
EXTRACURRICULAR
ACL (Association for Computational Linguistics) | Reviewer & Workshop Organizer 2019 - Present
Reviewed 40+ papers annually for top-tier NLP conferences (ACL, EMNLP, NAACL), maintaining consistent
acceptance standards
Organized 2 workshops on parameter-efficient fine-tuning attracting 300+ attendees from academia and industry
Hugging Face Community | Contributor & Ambassador 2020 - Present
Contributed 12 model implementations to Transformers library, accumulating 8.5K+ model downloads monthly
Maintained 2 open-source NLP toolkits with 3.2K GitHub stars and mentored 15+ new open-source contributors
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python (expert), SQL (advanced), Bash (intermediate), Java (intermediate)
Technologies – Transformers (BERT, GPT, T5, Llama), PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face, spaCy, NLTK, Keras,
LangChain, LLaMA Index, RAG systems, MLflow, Weights & Biases
Tools – Python, SQL, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, Apache Spark, Ray, AWS (SageMaker, EC2), Weights & Biases, Airflow,
Jupyter, VSCode
